points.label: Test-request plumbing: verdict comes back on the PR
points.summary: This point was declared IN the PR as docs/test-requests/….json and minted by the loop — the new worker-side test-request channel. Record any verdict here; PASS criterion checked by the NEXT loop tick: your verdict (thumb + this note) appears as a comment on the PR that shipped this file.

actions.text: Just record a verdict — the point under test is the plumbing that routes it back to the author PR.

points.label: Test-request plumbing: runs:2 re-opens after the first pass
points.summary: This point asks for TWO confirmations (runs:2). Give it a 👍 — within the next loop tick it must REAPPEAR on the queue for its second confirmation. The second 👍 retires it for good. If it never comes back, that is a FAIL to report on the second look.

actions.text: First 👍 → the loop re-opens this point; second 👍 → done. Verdict twice on separate passes.
